entities.name: CHILLI
entities.description: Capsicum annuum L., the crop studied for performance under different nutrient management practices

entities.name: SOIL TEST BASED INM PRACTICES
entities.description: Integrated Nutrient Management practices based on soil tests used to improve crop performance

entities.name: RANDOMIZED BLOCK DESIGN
entities.description: The experimental design used to lay out the treatment combinations

entities.name: FACTORIAL CONCEPT
entities.description: The conceptual approach used in the experimental design

entities.name: ANALYSIS OF VARIANCE
entities.description: The statistical method used to determine significant differences between treatment combinations

entities.name: INORGANIC PRACTICE
entities.description: The use of inorganic fertilizers as a nutrient management practice

entities.name: ORGANIC PRACTICE
entities.description: The use of organic fertilizers as a nutrient management practice

entities.name: WATER SPRAY
entities.description: The control treatment used in the experiment

entities.name: VEGETATIVE PARAMETERS
entities.description: Growth indicators including plant height, stem thickness, and number of primary and secondary branches

entities.name: EARLINESS
entities.description: Indicators of crop maturity, specifically days to first and 50% flowering

entities.name: YIELD PARAMETERS
entities.description: Productivity indicators including number of flowers and fruits per plant, fruit set percentage, average fruit weight, and yield per plant and plot

entities.name: QUALITY TRAITS
entities.description: Nutritional and chemical indicators including ascorbic acid content, dry matter percentage, and chlorophyll content in fruits

entities.name: NEERALAKATTI VILLAGE
entities.description: The specific village where the farmer's field experiment was conducted

entities.name: DHARWAD
entities.description: The district where the experiment was conducted

entities.name: KARNATAKA
entities.description: The state where the experiment was conducted

entities.name: KHARIF 2015
entities.description: The agricultural season and year during which the experiment took place
